result.stderr:
TemplateVault 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 David Love
USAGE:
Normal usage:
  TemplateVault --auth userpass settings.conf.tmpl
Override output file:
  TemplateVault --auth userpass settings.conf.tmpl generated_settings.conf
Specify authorization:
  TemplateVault --auth okta settings.conf.tmpl
Override authorization mount:
  TemplateVault --auth okta --auth-mount okta_mount settings.conf.tmpl

  -a, --auth                (Default: userpass) The kind of authentication to
                            use.

  -m, --auth-mount          Override the default auth mount point.

  -y                        Overwrite the output file without asking if it
                            already exists.

  --no-escape               (Default: false) Do not escape '"' and newline
                            characters in the replaced values

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.

  Template File (pos. 0)    Required. The template file to process.

  Output File (pos. 1)      The output to put the processed template result
                            into.
